responses_en: Hello! I am Nova, your student assistant at GSCWU Bahawalpur. I can help you with Admissions, Fee Structure, Timetable, Departments, and Teacher Contacts. What would you like to know?
Hi! Welcome to GSCWU Bahawalpur. Ask me anything about admissions, fees, timetable, departments or teacher contacts.
responses_ur: Assalam o Alaikum! Main Nova hoon, GSCWU Bahawalpur ka Student Assistant. Admissions, Fee Structure, Timetable, Departments aur Teachers ke baare mein pooch sakte hain.
Walaikum Assalam! Main Nova hoon. Admissions, fees, timetable, departments ya teachers ke baare mein kuch bhi poochh sakte hain.

responses_en: Goodbye! If you have more questions, I am always here. Good luck with your studies!
Take care! Come back anytime you need help.
responses_ur: Allah Hafiz! Dobara koi sawaal ho to zaroor aayein.
Khuda Hafiz! Best of luck!

responses_en: You are most welcome! Is there anything else I can help you with?
Happy to help! Feel free to ask if you have more questions.
responses_ur: Jazak Allah Khair! Aur kuch poochna ho to zaroor batayein.
Shukriya! Aur koi sawaal ho to main haazir hoon.

responses_en:
I can help you with:

1. Admissions — eligibility, documents, deadlines
2. Fee Structure — program fees, payment schedule
3. Timetable — class schedule, exam dates
4. Departments — info about all departments
5. Teacher Contacts — faculty names, emails, office hours

Just type your question!
responses_ur:
Main in topics mein madad kar sakta hoon:

1. Admissions - eligibility, documents, deadlines
2. Fee Structure - fees, payment schedule
3. Timetable - class schedule, exam dates
4. Departments - sare departments ki info
5. Teacher Contacts - faculty details

Bas apna sawaal type karein!

patterns: How do I apply for admission
responses_en:
Admissions at GSCWU Bahawalpur:

Admissions open in July each year.

Eligibility:
- Matric minimum 45% marks
- Intermediate minimum 45% marks

Required Documents:
1. Matric certificate and mark sheet
2. Intermediate certificate and mark sheet
3. Completed admission form
4. 2 passport size photographs
5. CNIC or B-Form copy
6. Domicile certificate

Merit is based on Intermediate marks percentage.

Admission Office: Block A, Main Campus
Phone: 0629-2880012 (Mon-Fri, 9am-4pm)

How to Apply at GSCWU:

1. Collect admission form from Admission Office
2. Fill all details and attach documents
3. Submit before the closing date
4. Merit list is displayed after 2 weeks
5. Complete enrollment and deposit fee if selected

Phone: 0629-2880012
responses_ur:
GSCWU mein Admission:

Admissions aksar July mein khulti hain.

Eligibility:
- Matric minimum 45% marks
- Intermediate minimum 45% marks

Zaruri Documents:
1. Matric certificate aur mark sheet
2. Inter certificate aur mark sheet
3. Admission form
4. 2 passport size photos
5. CNIC ya B-Form copy
6. Domicile certificate

Merit Intermediate marks par hoti hai.

Contact: Admission Office, Block A
Phone: 0629-2880012

Apply kaise karein:
1. Admission form Office se len
2. Sahi bhar ke documents attach karein
3. Deadline se pehle jama karein
4. Merit list 2 hafte baad
5. Selection par fee jama karein

Contact: 0629-2880012

patterns: fee structure for BS Computer Science
responses_en:
Fee Structure at GSCWU Bahawalpur (2024-2025):

BS Computer Science / BS IT:
- Annual Fee: PKR 45,000
- Per Semester: PKR 22,500
- Paid in 2 installments

BS Mathematics / Physics / Chemistry:
- Annual Fee: PKR 35,000

BS Education / BA / BCom:
- Annual Fee: PKR 25,000

Payment Schedule:
- 1st Installment: September
- 2nd Installment: February
- Late penalty: PKR 500/week

Finance Office: 0629-2880014

GSCWU Program Fees:

BS CS / IT: PKR 45,000/year
BS Science programs: PKR 35,000/year
Arts / Commerce: PKR 25,000/year

Fees are paid in 2 equal installments per year.
Contact Finance Office: 0629-2880014
responses_ur:
GSCWU Fee Structure 2024-2025:

BS CS / BS IT:
- Salana Fee: PKR 45,000
- Semester Fee: PKR 22,500
- 2 installments mein ada hoti hai

BS Math / Physics / Chemistry:
- Salana Fee: PKR 35,000

BS Education / BA / BCom:
- Salana Fee: PKR 25,000

Payment:
- 1st Installment: September
- 2nd Installment: February
- Late penalty: PKR 500/week

Finance Office: 0629-2880014

Fees:

BS CS / IT: PKR 45,000 salana
BS Science: PKR 35,000 salana
Arts / Commerce: PKR 25,000 salana

2 equal installments mein ada hoti hai.
Finance Office: 0629-2880014

responses_en:
Scholarships at GSCWU Bahawalpur:

1. Merit-Based Scholarship:
   - Top 3 students per department
   - 50% to 100% fee waiver
   - Requires CGPA 3.5 or above

2. Need-Based Scholarship:
   - For financially deserving students
   - Covers 25% to 75% of semester fee
   - Submit income certificate to Student Affairs

3. HEC Scholarships:
   - Apply at: hec.gov.pk/scholarships

Apply at Student Affairs Office, Block A
Email: studentaffairs@gscwu.edu.pk
responses_ur:
GSCWU Scholarships:

1. Merit-Based: Top 3 students ko 50-100% fee waiver (CGPA 3.5+)
2. Need-Based: Maaliyati tor par kamzor students ke liye 25-75% fee cover
3. HEC Scholarships: hec.gov.pk/scholarships

Apply: Student Affairs Office, Block A
Email: studentaffairs@gscwu.edu.pk

patterns: show me the class timetable for CS department
responses_en:
Class Timetable — BS CS 4th Semester (Sample):

Classes: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 2:00 PM

Monday: Data Structures 8:00-9:30 (CS-201), Computer Networks 10:00-11:30 (CS-202)
Tuesday: Operating Systems 8:00-9:30, CS Lab 11:00-1:00 (Lab 1)
Wednesday: Software Engineering 8:00-9:30 (CS-202)
Thursday: OS Lab 9:00-11:00 (CS Lab 2)
Friday: Software Engineering 10:00-11:30

For your exact timetable, check the Notice Board at Block C or ask your Class Representative.

Class Timings at GSCWU:

- Morning Shift: 8:00 AM to 2:00 PM
- Lecture Duration: 1 hour 30 minutes
- Break: 11:30 AM to 12:00 PM

Timetables are posted on the Notice Board each semester.
CS Department Office: Block C
responses_ur:
BS CS 4th Semester Timetable (Sample):

Classes: Monday se Friday, 8:00 AM - 2:00 PM

Monday: Data Structures 8-9:30 (CS-201), Computer Networks 10-11:30 (CS-202)
Tuesday: OS 8-9:30, CS Lab 11-1 (Lab 1)
Wednesday: Software Eng 8-9:30 (CS-202)
Thursday: OS Lab 9-11 (CS Lab 2)
Friday: Software Eng 10-11:30

Apna exact timetable Notice Board (Block C) par check karein.

Class Timings:
- Morning Shift: 8:00 AM - 2:00 PM
- Break: 11:30 AM - 12:00 PM

Timetable har semester Notice Board par lagaya jaata hai.
CS Office: Block C

responses_en:
Examination Schedule at GSCWU:

Midterm Exams:
- Week 8 of semester (November or April)
- Duration: 1 hour per paper

Final Exams:
- End of semester (December/January)
- Duration: 3 hours per paper

Exam timetable is posted 2 weeks before exams on Notice Boards.

Examination Office: Block A, 2nd Floor
Phone: 0629-2880015
responses_ur:
Examination Schedule:

Midterm: Semester ke Week 8 mein (November ya April)
Final Exams: Semester ke aakhir mein (December/January)

Timetable exams se 2 hafte pehle Notice Board par lagaya jaata hai.

Examination Office: Block A, 2nd Floor
Phone: 0629-2880015

patterns: What departments are available at GSCWU
responses_en:
Departments at GSCWU Bahawalpur:

1. Computer Science and IT (Block C)
   - BS Computer Science (4 years)
   - BS Information Technology (4 years)

2. Mathematics (Block B)
   - BS Mathematics (4 years)

3. Physics (Block B)
   - BS Physics (4 years)

4. Chemistry (Block D)
   - BS Chemistry (4 years)

5. English (Block A)
   - BS English (4 years)

6. Education (Block E)
   - BS Education (4 years), BEd (2 years)

7. Commerce (Block A)
   - BCom (2 years)

8. Urdu (Block A)
   - BS Urdu (4 years)

Ask about any department for more details!

CS and IT Department — GSCWU Bahawalpur:

Programs: BS CS, BS IT (4 years each)
Faculty: 14 qualified teachers (PhD and MS)
Labs: 3 computer labs, 30 workstations each
Location: Block C, Main Campus
Contact: cs@gscwu.edu.pk
Phone: +92-62-2201765
responses_ur:
GSCWU ke Departments:

1. CS and IT (Block C) - BS CS, BS IT

responses_en:
Hostel at GSCWU Bahawalpur:

Hostel accommodation is available for female students.

Fee: Approximately PKR 8,000 to 12,000 per month (meals included)

Facilities: 24/7 security, Dining, Generator backup, Internet, Warden on duty

How to Apply: Submit application form at Hostel Office (Block H) with admission confirmation and 2 passport photos.

Hostel Office: 0629-2880016
Note: Seats are limited, allocated on merit-cum-need basis.
responses_ur:
GSCWU Hostel:

Female students ke liye maujood hai.
Fee: PKR 8,000-12,000/month (meals included)

Facilities: Security, Mess, Generator, Internet, Warden

Apply: Hostel Office, Block H
Phone: 0629-2880016

Note: Seats limited hain, merit-cum-need basis par milti hain.
